name: explainer-video
description: Deterministic animated explainer films for any domain, on two backends — three.js 3D (cel shading, analytic IK, a per-frame-pure post chain, shots as data with a match-cut constraint) and Canvas2D flat vector — styled by swappable packs and bibles, delivered as self-contained HTML, frame-exact MP4, or animated WebP/AVIF that plays inline in a README
